urdu transliteration text:
Mera ghar jalaya lutiyan ridawan
ro akhay zainab kis pasay jawan
english translation text:
They burnt my house and snatched our veils
Zainab (a.s.) cries and says, where shall I go?

urdu transliteration text:
abid bachawan yaan agh bujawaan
Ro akhay zainab kis pasay jawan
english translation text:
Shall I save Abid (a.s) or shall I set off the fire?
Zainab (a.s.) cries and says, where shall I go?

urdu transliteration text:
Mera ghar jalaya lutiyan ridawan
ro akhay zainab kis pasay jawan
english translation text:
They burnt my house
and snatched our veils
Zainab (a.s.) cries and says,
where shall I go?

urdu transliteration text:
yusuf ton sohnay meray veer maaray
May shaam chaliyan be kafan saray
bodies are without shrouds
english translation text:
They killed my brothers who
are as beautiful as Yusuf
I have left for Shaam and all the

urdu transliteration text:
qabaran banawaan yaan rasiyan pawaan
Ro akhay zainab kis pasay jawan
english translation text:
Shall I dig their graves
or shall I tie the ropes?
Zainab (a.s.) cries and says,
where shall I go?

urdu transliteration text:
may deen bachawan vich shaam aayi
Sab logh vekhan meri be ridayi
Everyone witnessed me
without my veil
english translation text: I went to Shaam to save Islam

urdu transliteration text:

Ro akhay zainab kis pasay jawan
english translation text:

or shall I cover my face?
Zainab (a.s.) cries and says,
where shall I go?

jis veer de lay chadya medina

english translation text:

The way he as killed,
I will never forget

urdu transliteration text:
veeran de qatil khaimaych aagay
come into the tents
Ay hassan zainab abid nu akhay
english translation text:
My brother’s killers will
“Hassan” (poet) this is what
Zainab (a.s) said to Abid (a.s.)

urdu transliteration text:
hun jal may jawaan yaan baahar awaan
Ro akhay zainab kis pasay jawan.
english translation text:

should I come out of the tents?
Zainab (a.s.) cries and says,
where shall I go?
